latin: Leonidas uxori suae vale dixit. 'cum scuto aut in scuto,' illa respondit. 'redi victor aut mortuus — sed cum honore.' Leonidas risit et Spartam reliquit ut numquam rediret.

questions.prompt: What did Leonidas' wife tell him?
questions.target: Return with your shield or on it
choices: Return with your shield or on it

translation: Leonidas said farewell to his wife. 'With the shield or on the shield,' she replied. 'Return victorious or dead — but with honor.' Leonidas laughed and left Sparta never to return.
